task_completion.description: Initialize a local Git repository for the commons-cli project using Eclipse EGit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Project Explorer or Package Explorer shows the 'commons-cli' project with Git repository decorations (e.g., a repository icon or text like '[commons-cli NO-HEAD]' or '[commons-cli master]' next to the project name).

task_completion.description: Create a .gitignore file in the project root.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named '.gitignore' is visible in the Project Explorer directly under the 'commons-cli' project root directory.

task_completion.description: Configure the .gitignore file to exclude the required build artifacts and Eclipse configuration files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The .gitignore file is open in the Eclipse text editor and contains exactly or at least these five patterns: 'target/', '*.class', '.settings/', '.classpath', and '.project'.

task_completion.description: Stage all project files including the .gitignore file, ensuring build artifacts are excluded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eclipse 'Git Staging' view shows project files (like pom.xml, src/, and .gitignore) in the 'Staged Changes' area. The ignored files and directories (target, .settings, .classpath, .project, and .class files) must NOT appear in either the 'Staged Changes' or 'Unstaged Changes' areas.

task_completion.description: Make an initial local commit with the exact required commit message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Git Staging' view shows the exact message 'Initial commit: Import Apache Commons CLI library' in the Commit Message box right before clicking 'Commit', OR the Eclipse 'History' view shows a completed commit with this exact message.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Eclipse's EGit GUI rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with Eclipse menus (e.g., right-clicking the project -> Team -> Share Project) and the 'Git Staging' view. There should be no terminal windows open where 'git init', 'git add', or 'git commit' commands are typed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Eclipse IDE.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Eclipse IDE interface is visible, including the Project Explorer, Editor area, and standard Eclipse toolbars, rather than a different text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not attempt to push to a remote repository.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Commit' instead of 'Commit and Push' in the Git Staging view, and no 'Push to Branch' or remote URI configuration dialogs are completed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/commons-cli. Expected commit message: 'Initial commit: Import Apache Commons CLI library'. Required .gitignore patterns to be visually verified: target/, *.class, .settings/, .classpath, .project.
